message.content:
@startuml
title Search for Products by ID (using DB dao)

actor User
participant "«main»\nAdministration" as Administration
participant "«frame»\nMainMenu" as MainMenu
participant "«dialog»\nProductReportDialog" as ProductReportDialog
participant "«ProductDAO»\nProductDatabaseDAO" as ProductDatabaseDAO
participant "SimpleListModel\n:model" as SimpleListModel
database "Database" as Database

Administration -> MainMenu : «construct»

User -> Administration : clicks 'View Products'
Administration -> ProductReportDialog : «construct»
ProductReportDialog -> ProductDatabaseDAO : «construct»

ProductReportDialog -> ProductDatabaseDAO : getProducts()
ProductDatabaseDAO -> Database : select * from product
Database --> ProductDatabaseDAO : ResultSet
ProductDatabaseDAO -> ProductDatabaseDAO : reconstruct products\nfrom ResultSet
ProductDatabaseDAO --> ProductReportDialog : products

ProductReportDialog -> SimpleListModel : «construct»
ProductReportDialog -> SimpleListModel : updateItems(products)

note left of ProductReportDialog : products now\nvisible to user
ProductReportDialog -> ProductReportDialog : lstProducts.setModel(model)

User -> ProductReportDialog : enters product id into search bar
ProductReportDialog -> ProductReportDialog : txtId.getText : id

User -> ProductReportDialog : clicks "Search"
ProductReportDialog -> ProductDatabaseDAO : search(id)
ProductDatabaseDAO -> Database : select * from product where product_id = id
Database --> ProductDatabaseDAO : product
ProductDatabaseDAO --> ProductReportDialog : updateItems(product)

ProductReportDialog -> SimpleListModel : updateItems(product)

note left of ProductReportDialog : only searched product\nnow visible to user
ProductReportDialog -> ProductReportDialog : lstProducts.getModel(model)

@enduml
